releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SalokinGreen/NAI4Obsidian/compare/1.2.3...1.2.4
Added new samplers Unified and the amazing preset Zany Scribe.

releases.author: SalokinGreen
releases.description:
**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SalokinGreen/NAI4Obsidian/compare/1.2.2...1.2.3

Removed CFG as an option. Using CFG causes 400 errors since it got removed.

releases.author: SalokinGreen
releases.description:
Kayra stopped working because the api infrastructure was changed and I updated N4O to work with the new api.

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/SalokinGreen/NAI4Obsidian/compare/1.2.1...1.2.2

releases.author: SalokinGreen
releases.description:
Added default presets for easy and fast use.
Fixed the error, from my side, where the cursor moved down too far after generating in the middle of the file.

- Lorebook
- Mirostat Tau (setting)
- Mirostat LR (setting)
- Top G (setting)

releases.author: SalokinGreen
releases.description:
# Added
- Auto Instruct
- Adjustable Instruct Range
releases.name: v1.1.1

releases.author: SalokinGreen
releases.description:
# Added
- Kayra support (new model)
- CFG (new sampler)
- Phrase Repetition Penality (new sampler)
- Removing images from context

# Removed
- Sigurd support (old model)
- Euterpe support (old model)
- Krake support (old model)
- Old tokenizers
releases.name: v1.1.0

releases.author: SalokinGreen
releases.description:
This is the first release of NAI4Obsidian, an plugin designed to integrate seamlessly with Obsidian and artificial intelligence technology from novelai.net. Say goodbye to writer's block and experience a new realm of creativity as you harness the power of AI text generation directly within your Obsidian vault.
It's simple for now, but the future brings many possibilities.
_I'm not affiliated with NovelAI in any way. I just like their products. They're like fried eggs and swimming without socks. The best you can get._
releases.name: NAI4Obsidian v1.0.0
